debug_info.goal:
S : HarmonicOscillator
IC : ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions
x : Time → EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 1)
⊢ S.EquationOfMotion x ∧
      x 0 = ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions.x₀ IC ∧
        Time.deriv x 0 = ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions.v₀ IC →
    x = ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions.trajectory S IC

failed_attempts:
intro h
  exact S.EquationOfMotion_uniqueness x (IC.trajectory S) h.1 (trajectory_equationOfMotion S IC)
    (h.2.1.trans (IC.trajectory_position_at_zero S).symm)
    (h.2.2.trans (IC.trajectory_velocity_at_zero S).symm)

intro h
  exact S.equationOfMotion_unique x IC h.1 h.2.1 h.2.2

intro h
  exact S.equationOfMotion_uniqueness x (IC.trajectory S) h.1 (trajectory_equationOfMotion IC)
    (h.2.1.trans (trajectory_position_at_zero IC).symm)
    (h.2.2.trans (trajectory_velocity_at_zero IC).symm)

simpa [ω_sq] using congr_fun (congr_arg (fun x => x i) h.1) t'))
  obtain ⟨a, b, hsol⟩ := exists_cos_sin_combination hx hxx S.ω
  have ha : a = IC.x₀ i := by simpa [h.2.1] using hsol 0
  have hb : b = IC.v₀ i / S.ω := by
    have := (hx 0).unique (by simpa [ha] using ((hasDerivAt_cos 0).const_smul a).add ((hasDerivAt_sin 0).const_smul b) |>.comp 0 (hasDerivAt_mul_const S.ω))
    simpa [S.ω_neq_zero] using this
  simp [trajectory_eq, hsol, ha, hb, S.ω_neq_zero, mul_comm, div_mul_cancel]

intro h
  exact S.trajectory_unique x IC h.1 h.2.1 h.2.2

intro ⟨hx, hx0, hv0⟩
  exact S.EquationOfMotion_unique hx (trajectory_equationOfMotion IC)
    (hx0.trans (InitialConditions.trajectory_position_at_zero IC).symm)
    (hv0.trans (InitialConditions.trajectory_velocity_at_zero IC).symm)
sorry

simp [h.2.1]) (by simp [h.2.2])
